content: this call may be recorded for quality and training
purposes. para español, oprima el 2. thanks for calling pivot
point orthopedics, part of pretty good ai. am i speaking with sarah?

yeah, this is Sarah. 

how can I help you today?
for verification, may i have your date of birth?

March 15 1985. 

just let me know what you need help with.
i can help with appointments, medication refills,
insurance updates, general clinic questions, and more.
what would you like to do today?

I need to schedule an orthopedic consultation. 

I've had knee pain for about two weeks after a running injury.
thanks for sharing that, sarah. for your knee pain, a
new patient consultation is the best fit. would you like to see the
first available provider, or do you have a preference for who you see?

whichever is earliest is fine. 

mornings are better for me, but I'm flexible if that's all that's open.
let me check the soonest available morning appointments for a new patient
consultation with any provider.
one more.

ok. 

I appreciate it.
the soonest
Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you repeat the last part?
no problem. the soonest morning appointment is
monday, march 30th at 9.45 a.m. with dr. adam
bricker. would you like to book that or hear about other options?

um, that sounds good. 

I'll take that one.
great. what would you like me to know as the reason for your visit?
i have knee pain after a running injury.
does that sound right or would you like to add anything?

yeah, that's right. 

no need to add anything else.
it looks like there was an issue booking the appointment due to a
problem with the visit reason. let me try again to get this scheduled for you.

ok. 

let me know if it goes through this time.
i'm still having trouble booking the appointment due to a system
issue with the visit reason. i'll document this for our clinic support teams
so they can follow up and get your appointment scheduled. please stay on the line while i
update your request.

alright. 

I'll wait here.
since i'm unable to resolve this due to a system issue
and live support is available, i'll connect you to our clinic support team
now so they can help finish booking your appointment. please stay on the line
connecting you to a representative. please wait.

ok, thanks. 

I'll stay on the line.
hello, you've reached the pretty good ai test line.
goodbye.

alright, bye. 

thanks anyway.
